news.t: Herbal Dispatch Obtains Export Development Canada (EDC) Insurance to Support Accelerating International Growth
Europe's chemical makers catch a break as Iran war hits Asian rivals

holdings.infoBox: EDC is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MSCI Emerging Markets Bull 3X ETF (EDC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of companies operating in emerging markets. EDC was launched on Dec 17, 2008 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Europe's chemical makers catch a break as Iran war hits Asian rivals
data.text: Europe's embattled chemicals ​industry is getting an unexpected lift from the Iran war, as supply disruptions raise costs ‌for Asian rivals and customers prioritise reliability over price.
